# subscript(_:)

**Instance Subscript**

Access an indexed `AudioBuffer` (`mBuffers[i]`).

## Declaration

```swift
subscript(index: UnsafeMutableAudioBufferListPointer.Index) -> UnsafeMutableAudioBufferListPointer.Element { get nonmutating set }
```
